npcs.summary: Visible Collectr value is $636.20, but the book is concentrated: Nami alone is about 63 percent of visible value. Verify comps before treating app value as cash.
dialogue: Our treasure map says $636.20 visible value, but one orange-haired card is carrying most of the chest.
Hold the Nami until sold comps prove the number. If a serious buyer pays high comps, upgrade into a stronger grade instead of adding weak filler.

npcs.summary: Official sources verify OP14/EB04 Warlords, OP13 context, EB03 heroine context, and the English 3rd Anniversary Set delivery month of August 2026.
dialogue: The records are clear: OP14/EB04 is a Warlords signal, and the August 2026 anniversary set is the Three Brothers watch item.
I keep the evidence ledger here. If a claim cannot survive the ledger, it does not enter the captain's plan.

npcs.summary: The vault has local media for Crocodile, Luffy, Zoro-Juurou, Franky, Nami, and Carrot, plus official card art where available.
dialogue: I built pedestals for every slab we can show safely. No address, no tracking, no account details, just the cards.
When new card media lands, drop it into the vault and tag the provenance before it reaches the scene.

npcs.summary: Open Courtyard exposure is $197.50. Top keep is PSA 10 Sabo at $19. First cancels are Shiki CGC 8 and duplicate Roger CGC 8.5.
dialogue: Thirteen shots on the board, $197.50 exposed. The best shot is Sabo PSA 10 at $19.
Cancel the low-grade Shiki and duplicate Roger. Keep the cannon loaded for Luffy, Roger, Ace, Sabo, Whitebeard, and Warlords.

npcs.summary: Use Courtyard/Phygitals for slabs, eBay/PSA Vault and TCGplayer/Cardmarket for broader liquidity checks, and Cape Town routes for local buyers.
dialogue: Do not cook every dish in the same pan. Slabs, sealed, local buyers, and vault routes all price differently.
For Cape Town, check Card Cache, TCGXchange, Wizards, Facebook/Discord safeguards, and Collect-a-Con timing before listing.

npcs.summary: Avoid low-grade traps, thin comps, modern PSA 9 duplicates, and assuming CGC 10 equals PSA 10 liquidity.
dialogue: The medicine is discipline: no weak low-grade slabs, no fake certainty, no oversized bids without comps.
A CGC 10 can be excellent, but the exit channel decides the premium. Check the buyer pool before you prescribe a price.

npcs.summary: The prior dossier PDF and HTML are archived under media/reports, with narration/music and stills available for the theater.
dialogue: The report is on stage, the audio is ready, and the hidden soundtrack waits for explorers who finish the vault.
If the final MP4 returns, place it in media/video and I will put it in the theater lineup.
